name: Ice-Cream Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Fit the pie crust into a 9 inch pie plate according to package directions; fold edges under and crimp.
2. Prick the bottom and sides with a fork.
3. Press coconut into the piecrust.
4. Bake at 425°F for 9 to 11 minutes or until golden brown, then cool.
5. Combine ice cream, orange juice concentrate, and pineapple. Cover and freeze for 1 hour.
6. Spoon the mixture into the prepared piecrust. Cover and freeze for an additional 8 hours or overnight.
Makes 1 9 inch pie.
